Hostage (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $34,636,443Details
International Box Office $43,000,000
Worldwide Box Office $77,636,443
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$10,214,734 (29.5% of total gross)
Legs:3.39 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:44.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$75,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,123 opening theaters/2,183 max. theaters, 5.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $64,625,872

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 11th, 2005 (Wide) by Miramax
International Releases: April 15th, 2005 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: June 21st, 2005 by Miramax Video
MPA Rating: R for strong graphic violence, language and some drug use
Running Time: 113 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Prologue
Plot point: Hostage, Kidnap, Murder - Suicide
Social setting: Organized Crime
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
